code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)
  if n == 0
    print("lines=0")
  else
    mut count = 0
    mut i = 0
    while i < n
      let b = string.byte_at(input, i)
      match b
      when Some(byte)
        if byte == 10
          count = count + 1
        end
      when None
        i = n
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    let last = string.byte_at(input, n - 1)
    match last
    when Some(byte)
      if byte != 10
        count = count + 1
      end
    when None
      count = count + 1
    end
    print("lines=#{count}")
  end
end
